plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts` line 7.

### The Bug
```typescript
// BROKEN — stops one iteration too early, last item is always skipped
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

### The Fix
```typescript
// FIXED — iterates over all items including the last
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### What changes
| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/utils.ts` | Line 7: `items.length - 1` → `items.length` |

### Verification
Run `npm test` — all 4 existing test cases in `tests/utils.test.ts` should pass (multi-item, single-item, two-item, and empty array).

This is a single-character removal (`- 1`) and nothing else needs to change.
